Our Story

The Besu Family —
Farming Since 2001

👪 Meet the Family

📪

Mr. Givemore Besu

Founder & Farm Director · Established BESU FARM in 2001

📫

Mrs. S. Besu

Co-Founder · Operations & Livestock Management

🌿

The Besu Children

Next generation — continuing the family farming legacy

BESU FARM was established in 2001 by Mr. Givemore Besu and his wife Mrs. S. Besu on the fertile Alaska lands of Chinhoyi, Zimbabwe. Over 24 years, this family venture has grown into a fully irrigated, diversified agricultural enterprise respected across Mashonaland West.

The farm is proudly 100% family owned and operated. The Besu children are actively involved in daily operations, carrying forward the legacy of quality, sustainable farming that their parents built from the ground up.

Modern Equipment

Tractors, planters and modern agri-machinery.

Full Irrigation

Centre pivot and drip systems all year.

Community

Supporting Chinhoyi livelihoods since 2001.

Water Management

Advanced Irrigation Systems

BESU FARM operates a fully irrigated system covering all cultivated land. Centre pivot systems, drip lines and sprinklers ensure consistent yields 365 days a year — independent of seasonal rainfall.

🔄

Centre Pivot Systems

Large-scale rotating pivots covering wide crop fields with even, efficient water distribution.

💧

Drip Irrigation

Precision drip lines deliver water directly to roots, saving water and boosting quality.

🌊

Sprinkler Systems

High-pressure sprinklers for vegetables and seedbeds, mimicking natural rainfall.

📅

Year-Round Production

Full irrigation enables 365-day farming with stable output independent of rains.

What We Grow

Our Crop Produce

Tap each card to discover more. All crops are irrigated and sustainably grown on our Chinhoyi farm.

Maize

Maize

White and yellow maize on large irrigated fields — our flagship crop supplying households, grain mills and commercial buyers.

Staple Grain
Soya Beans

Soya Beans

High-protein legume grown for oil extraction, stockfeed and human consumption. A key commercial crop for local and export markets.

Legume · Oil
Sunflowers

Sunflowers

Commercially grown for premium oil seed production. Golden fields supplying processors across Zimbabwe with high-quality seeds.

Oil Crop
Tomatoes

Tomatoes

Vine-ripened, irrigated year-round. Supplying fresh markets, vendors and food processors in Chinhoyi and Harare.

Market Veg
Vegetables

Vegetables

Spinach, rape, cabbage, kale and butternuts harvested weekly for households, markets and institutional buyers.

Leafy Greens
Peppers

Peppers

Sweet bell peppers and hot chili varieties grown under drip irrigation for consistent size, colour and quality demanded by top buyers.

Capsicum
Wheat

Wheat

Winter wheat under centre pivot irrigation, supplying grain millers and the bread industry in Mashonaland West.

Winter Grain
Sorghum

Sorghum

Drought-resilient traditional grain for sadza, animal fodder and traditional beverages. A vital crop for Zimbabwean food culture.

Traditional Grain
Groundnuts

Groundnuts

Roasting and export-grade peanuts. Protein-rich and widely loved across Zimbabwe, sold to processing companies and local markets.

Legume · Nut
Cowpeas

Cowpeas

Drought-tolerant, protein-rich legume grown as an intercrop. Sold fresh and dried to local households and traders throughout the region.

Legume
Green Peas

Green Peas

Sweet green peas under drip irrigation, sold fresh to supermarkets, restaurants and households. Consistent quality and high demand.

Legume · Fresh
Sweet Potatoes

Sweet Potatoes

Orange and white flesh varieties rich in nutrition. Hugely popular in local markets and supplied to retailers across Mashonaland West.

Root Crop

Our Animals

Livestock & Poultry

Raised with expert care, fed on farm-grown fodder and managed daily by the Besu family team.

Beef · Dairy

Cattle

Beef and dairy breeds grazed on open natural pasture, producing quality meat and fresh milk for local markets year-round.

Meat · Milk

Goats

Hardy indigenous and crossbreed goats adapted to Chinhoyi conditions, valued for premium chevon meat and nutritious milk.

Pork · Bacon

Pigs

Large White and Landrace pigs in clean ventilated pens, fed on farm-grown grain producing premium pork cuts for local markets.

Eggs · Poultry

Chickens

Free-range broilers and prolific laying hens. Fresh eggs harvested daily alongside quality poultry meat for local markets.

Meat · Eggs

Ducks

Muscovy and Pekin ducks raised naturally near farm dams, producing rich flavourful meat and highly nutritious eggs for local buyers.

Meat · Pelts

Rabbits

New Zealand White rabbits on farm-produced feed. High-protein, affordable livestock meeting rising demand in local markets.

Opportunities

Invest, Partner & Grow With Us

BESU FARM welcomes investors, outgrowers, agri-businesses and development partners. Join us in building Zimbabwe's agricultural future from the heart of Chinhoyi.

💰

Invest in BESU FARM

Structured investment in crop production, irrigation expansion, livestock development and cold storage. Strong returns backed by 24 years of proven farming excellence.

Enquire Now
🤝

Become a Partner Grower

Own land or have farming skills? Partner as an outgrower or contract farmer. We provide quality inputs, technical support and guaranteed offtake agreements.

Apply to Partner
📢

Promote & Market

Agri-businesses, retailers, NGOs and development partners welcome. We seek bulk supply agreements, branding partnerships and market access collaborations.

Let's Talk

Why Invest in BESU FARM?

📅

24 Years Track Record

Established 2001. Proven consistent production and reliable family management across decades.

💧

100% Irrigated

Centre pivot and drip systems ensure year-round output with no rain-dependency.

🌎

Strategic Location

Chinhoyi is a key agri-hub with excellent road access to Harare and major markets.

👪

Family Managed

Owner-managed ensures accountability, dedication and generational continuity.
